# awscc_bedrock_knowledge_base_policy (Data Source)

Data Source schema for AWS::Bedrock::KnowledgeBasePolicy



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.

### Read-Only

- `knowledge_base_id` (String) The unique identifier of the knowledge base
- `policy_document` (String) The IAM policy document defining access permissions for the knowledge base
- `revision_id` (String) The revision identifier for the policy, used for optimistic concurrency control
